summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of White Label Merchant Services page at /white-label-merchant-services completed. 22 of 23 tests passed. One issue found: meta description not overriding default site meta description (uses 'Merchant Solutions Corp provides...' instead of page-specific 'Launch your own merchant services brand...').

seo_issues.issue: Meta description not being overridden - react-helmet-async not replacing default meta from index.html
seo_issues.expected: Launch your own merchant services brand with our white label payment processing platform...
seo_issues.actual: Merchant Solutions Corp provides payment processing, POS systems, and business solutions...

action_items: LOW: Fix meta description override - react-helmet-async is not replacing the default meta description from index.html. Consider using data-react-helmet attribute on the default meta tag or ensure HelmetProvider is properly configured.
critical_code_review_comments: WhiteLabelMerchantServices.jsx well-structured at 617 lines with proper component organization
FAQ JSON-LD schema correctly formatted with 5 questions matching visible FAQ section
Calendly integration properly loads CSS and JS dynamically on mount
FAQItem component uses proper schema.org microdata (itemScope, itemProp) for SEO rich snippets
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for robust automated testing
Internal links use React Router Link components for SPA navigation
Modal implementation includes backdrop blur, click-outside-to-close, and close button
Lead Connector form loaded via iframe as expected
Navigation.jsx correctly updated with 'White Label Merchant Services' in Partnerships dropdown (line 144)
Three pricing tier cards with proper styling: Starter (blue), Pro (indigo, 'Most Popular'), Enterprise (amber)
Route correctly configured in App.js at /white-label-merchant-services (line 188)
seed_data_creation: N/A - static content page with no API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: White Label Merchant Services page at /white-label-merchant-services tested. All 12 sections present with correct headings: Hero, What is White Label, Why Build Your Own Brand, Ideal Partners (7 types), Program Options (Starter $499-$999/mo, Pro $5,999+$7,500+$999/mo, Enterprise $25,000), Build Merchant Portfolio, Infrastructure (6 items), Card Brand Registration, Stop Building Someone Else's Brand, FAQ (5 questions with accordion), Final CTA, Internal Links (5 links). Navigation shows 'White Label Merchant Services' in Partnerships dropdown. Lead Connector modal works for Apply buttons. Calendly configured for booking calls. One SEO issue: meta description not being overridden by react-helmet-async. All data-testid attributes present for testing.
rca_of_issue: Meta description issue: The default meta description in /app/frontend/public/index.html is not being replaced by react-helmet-async. This is likely because the default meta tag lacks the data-react-helmet attribute needed for proper override. The Helmet component in WhiteLabelMerchantServices.jsx has the correct content but is not removing/replacing the existing meta tag.
